content.text:
Here's the result of running `cat -n` on /tmp/output.txt:
     1	int 'int'	 [StartOfLine] Loc=<<stdin>:1:1>
     2	identifier 'main' [LeadingSpace] Loc=<<stdin>:1:5>
     3	l_paren '(' [LeadingSpace] Loc=<<stdin>:1:9>
     4	r_paren ')' [LeadingSpace] Loc=<<stdin>:1:10>
     5	l_brace '{' [LeadingSpace] Loc=<<stdin>:1:11>
     6	return 'return' [LeadingSpace] Loc=<<stdin>:2:5>
     7	numeric_constant '3' [LeadingSpace] Loc=<<stdin>:2:12>
     8	semi ';' [LeadingSpace] Loc=<<stdin>:2:13>
     9	r_brace '}'	 [StartOfLine] Loc=<<stdin>:3:1>
    10	eof '' [LeadingSpace] Loc=<<stdin>:3:2>
    11
